form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. McConnell submitted the following resolution; which was considered and agreed to

form.official-title: Making minority party appointments for certain committees for the 111th Congress.

section.text: That the following be the minority membership on the following committees for the remainder of the 111th Congress, or until their successors are appointed:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. McCain, Mr. Inhofe, Mr. Sessions, Mr. Chambliss, Mr. Graham, Mr. Thune, Mr. Wicker, Mr. LeMieux, Mr. Brown, Mr. Burr, Mr. Vitter, and Ms. Collins.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Collins, Mr. Coburn, Mr. Brown, Mr. McCain, Mr. Voinovich, Mr. Ensign, and Mr. Graham.
Mr. Burr, Mr. Isakson, Mr. Wicker, Mr. Johanns, Mr. Brown, and Mr. Graham.
